creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 255081
[PATCH] cad/abc: update g20220920 → 1.01.g20241106

maintainer timeout

Please edit the patch so that it uses the full git hash for GH_TAGNAME.

Instead of the TEST option, check if you can use cmake:testing and add ABC_SKIP_TESTS to CMAKE_ON and CMAKE_TESTING_OFF.  googletest then becomes a TEST_DEPENDS.

If you address these issues, I can likely commit your patch.
